mapper.select: select id, document_id, job_type, status, total_documents, indexed_documents, failed_documents, message, started_at, finished_at, created_at from cook_ai_knowledge_index_jobs where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into cook_ai_knowledge_index_jobs ( document_id, job_type, status, total_documents, indexed_documents, failed_documents, message, started_at ) values ( #{documentId}, #{jobType}, #{status}, #{totalDocuments}, #{indexedDocuments}, #{failedDocuments}, #{message}, current_timestamp )
mapper.update: update cook_ai_knowledge_index_jobs set status = #{status}, total_documents = #{totalDocuments}, indexed_documents = #{indexedDocuments}, failed_documents = #{failedDocuments}, message = #{message}, finished_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
